'''koyathaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:labiolingual|labiolingual]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-y-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:labiolingual|labiolingual]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| koyathaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:koyathithi|koyathithi]] || [[word:koyathiji|koyathiji]] || [[word:koyathishi|koyathishi]] || [[word:koyathiki|koyathiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:koyathuthuthu|koyathuthuthu]] || [[word:koyathujuju|koyathujuju]] || [[word:koyathushushu|koyathushushu]] || [[word:koyathukuku|koyathukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:koyathuthu|koyathuthu]] || [[word:koyathuju|koyathuju]] || [[word:koyathushu|koyathushu]] || [[word:koyathuku|koyathuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:koyathufthuf|koyathufthuf]] || [[word:koyathufjuf|koyathufjuf]] || [[word:koyathufshuf|koyathufshuf]] || [[word:koyathufkuf|koyathufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:koyathethe|koyathethe]] || [[word:koyatheje|koyatheje]] || [[word:koyatheshe|koyatheshe]] || [[word:koyatheke|koyatheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:koyathothotho|koyathothotho]] || [[word:koyathojojo|koyathojojo]] || [[word:koyathoshosho|koyathoshosho]] || [[word:koyathokoko|koyathokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:koyathotho|koyathotho]] || [[word:koyathojo|koyathojo]] || [[word:koyathosho|koyathosho]] || [[word:koyathoko|koyathoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:koyathofthof|koyathofthof]] || [[word:koyathofjof|koyathofjof]] || [[word:koyathofshof|koyathofshof]] || [[word:koyathofkof|koyathofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:koyathïfthïf|koyathïfthïf]] || [[word:koyathïfjïf|koyathïfjïf]] || [[word:koyathïfshïf|koyathïfshïf]] || [[word:koyathïfkïf|koyathïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:koyathïfthïfthïf|koyathïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:koyathïfjïfjïf|koyathïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:koyathïfshïfshïf|koyathïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:koyathïfkïfkïf|koyathïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:koyathïfthïf|koyathïfthïf]] || [[word:koyathïfjïf|koyathïfjïf]] || [[word:koyathïfshïf|koyathïfshïf]] || [[word:koyathïfkïf|koyathïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:koyathïfthïf|koyathïfthïf]] || [[word:koyathïfjïf|koyathïfjïf]] || [[word:koyathïfshïf|koyathïfshïf]] || [[word:koyathïfkïf|koyathïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:koyathæthæ|koyathæthæ]] || [[word:koyathæjæ|koyathæjæ]] || [[word:koyathæshæ|koyathæshæ]] || [[word:koyathækæ|koyathækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:koyathathatha|koyathathatha]] || [[word:koyathajaja|koyathajaja]] || [[word:koyathashasha|koyathashasha]] || [[word:koyathakaka|koyathakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:koyathatha|koyathatha]] || [[word:koyathaja|koyathaja]] || [[word:koyathasha|koyathasha]] || [[word:koyathaka|koyathaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:koyathafthaf|koyathafthaf]] || [[word:koyathafjaf|koyathafjaf]] || [[word:koyathafshaf|koyathafshaf]] || [[word:koyathafkaf|koyathafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:koyathasha|koyathasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:koyathshësha|koyathshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:koyathrosha|koyathrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:koyathmusha|koyathmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:koyathyasha|koyathyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokoyathnkshësha|gokoyathnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokoyathnkrosha|gokoyathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokoyathnkmusha|gokoyathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokoyathnkyasha|gokoyathnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:koyayathasha|koyayathasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:koyayathshësha|koyayathshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:koyayathrosha|koyayathrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:koyayathmusha|koyayathmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:koyayathyasha|koyayathyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokoyayathnkshësha|gokoyayathnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokoyayathnkrosha|gokoyayathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokoyayathnkmusha|gokoyayathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokoyayathnkyasha|gokoyayathnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:keyæthasha|keyæthasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:keyæthshësha|keyæthshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:keyæthrosha|keyæthrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:keyæthmusha|keyæthmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:keyæthyasha|keyæthyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokeyæthnkshësha|gokeyæthnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokeyæthnkrosha|gokeyæthnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokeyæthnkmusha|gokeyæthnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokeyæthnkyasha|gokeyæthnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:koyfathasha|koyfathasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:koyfathshësha|koyfathshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:koyfathrosha|koyfathrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:koyfathmusha|koyfathmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:koyfathyasha|koyfathyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokoyfathnkshësha|gokoyfathnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokoyfathnkrosha|gokoyfathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokoyfathnkmusha|gokoyfathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokoyfathnkyasha|gokoyfathnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|27df60f}}
